_meta.method: Same 3-factor consensus as refresh_fo_cloud.py (EMA alignment, MACD, pivot breakout, ROC5). votes==6 -> single-leg, votes in [4,5] -> capped-risk spread.

ICICIBANK.name: ICICIBANK
ICICIBANK.data_warning: Signals based on 2026-07-16 close (yfinance EOD, delayed/unofficial). Verify in Kite before trading.
ICICIBANK.commentary: WAIT (CE 1/6, PE 1/6 -- neither side reached the 4-vote threshold): EMA18/EMA50 not cleanly stacked with price -- no trend edge from this factor | MACD (26.03) is below its signal line (27.18) -- bearish momentum (+1 PE) | price is between pivot support (1407.6) and resistance (1426.4) -- no breakout yet | 5-day momentum (ROC5 2.57%) is strongly positive (+1 CE) ⚠ All 4 factors above are derived from the same single price series -- not independent confirmations. A high vote count means one strong trend measured 4 ways, not 4 separate signals agreeing.
